title: tephroseris palustris subsp. congesta
intro: Tephroseris palustris subsp. congesta, also known as Marsh Fleabane or Yellow Mountain Fleabane, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to mountainous regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tephroseris palustris subsp. congesta include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
